data.title: DENSO Foundation grants $1 million to North American universities for STEM education, promoting auto and manufacturing careers.
data.description: DENSO, a major player in the mobility industry, revealed that on January 28, 2026, in SOUTHFIELD, Mich., the DENSO North America Foundation (DNAF) is taking significant steps to promote STEM careers within automotive and manufacturing fields. Their efforts include financial backing to advance programs aimed at inspiring students to pursue paths in these sectors. This move highlights DENSO's commitment to fostering future talents in STEM.

data.title: Gold surged to $5,300/oz, up 22% monthly, while silver hit $114/oz, up 59% ytd. Memory stocks soared, with Seagate up 20%. Markets closed mixed, Nasdaq up 0.4% at 26,000. Fed kept rates at 3.50%–3.75%. Powell's press conference drew attention.
data.description: Wall Street saw modest gains as gold broke records above $5,300 an ounce before the Federal Open Market Committee meeting. Gold is up over 22% this month, its strongest performance since 1980. Silver rose nearly 3% to $114 per ounce, up 59% year-to-date. S&P 500 hit a new high near 7,000 before dropping 30 points. Nasdaq 100 rose 0.4%, surpassing 26,000. Seagate Technology surged 20%, Sandisk climbed 7.3%, Western Digital rose 9%, and Micron Technology added over 5%. Fed expected to keep interest rates at 3.50%–3.75%. Chair Jerome Powell's press conference is awaited amid a criminal investigation into the Fed's building renovation.

data.title: Stride stock surges after a 54% plunge; China educator tests buy point. Recovery still incomplete.
data.description: Even after a significant surge on Wednesday, Stride stock is yet to fully bounce back from the massive 54% drop it experienced. The education firm is showing positive signs as it leaves the setback in the past, while a China-based educator is currently testing a potential buy point.

data.title: Amphenol stock drops due to data center sales concerns. Celestica also facing similar fears. - Investor's Business Daily
data.description: Amphenol experienced a decline in its stock on Wednesday due to concerns about a potential slowdown in data center sales. Investors are likely to have similar apprehensions about Celestica as it prepares to report its earnings. This indicates a trend affecting data center suppliers, with Amphenol facing organic growth fears. Celestica is anticipated to face similar scrutiny in the upcoming days.

data.title: Starbucks sees earnings decrease, Brinker International exceeds expectations with Chili's success. EAT stock declines.
data.description: Starbucks saw a slight increase in advanced earnings, while Brinker International exceeded expectations thanks to the strength of Chili's. EAT stocks experienced a decline after initial gains. The post suggests that both Starbucks and Brinker International relinquished their earnings gains, causing shares to ease from their initial entries.

data.title: Tesla's earnings announcement & conference call by Elon Musk is awaited. Focus on robotaxis. Stock below key levels.
data.description: After market close, Tesla is expected to release its earnings report, which will include Elon Musk's insights on robotaxis and other developments during the conference call. The stock price of Tesla is currently trading below critical levels. Stay tuned for live coverage of Elon Musk's conference call for further updates.

data.title: Permian Resources stock receives a higher IBD Rating due to increasing price performance.
data.description: Permian Resources has demonstrated a notable increase in price performance, resulting in an upgrade to its IBD Relative Strength Rating. This upgrade is reflective of the company's improving stock performance.

data.title: DealerOps and UpdatePromise collaborate to merge data clarity and service communication for faster dealership operations.
data.description: With the increasing demand for dealerships to enhance their operations and provide customers with greater transparency, DealerOps and UpdatePromise have joined forces. This partnership aims to offer executive-level data clarity and instant service communication. By combining their expertise, they strive to assist dealers in improving efficiency and delivering enhanced customer experiences.

data.title: Atlas Ocean Voyages reveals star-studded roster of guest chefs for 2026 European season. Fla, Jan 28, 2026.
data.description: Atlas Ocean Voyages has revealed a lineup of renowned guest chefs, pastry experts, culinary historians, and vintners for their upcoming 2026 European season, strengthening their onboard culinary offerings. The announcement was made in Fort Lauderdale, Florida on January 28, 2026. The lineup includes a diverse group of experts who will enhance the culinary experience for passengers during their voyages. To access accompanying imagery, please refer to the provided link.

data.title: Acclinate's 2025 report shows progress in health equity with gains in trust and clinical trial access amid challenges.
data.description: Acclinate, based in Birmingham, Alabama, recently published its 2025 annual NOWINCLUDED impact report, revealing significant advancements in trust, participation, and accessibility to clinical trials within the healthcare sector. The report showcases measurable improvements in these areas despite challenges faced by the industry. This community-focused approach saw a notable increase in trust among participants, higher engagement levels, and improved access to clinical trials. The report signifies the positive impact of Acclinate's strategies, indicating a promising outlook in the healthcare sector.

data.title: Senate to discuss amendments to crypto market bill due to concerns over CFTC imbalance with just one confirmed commissioner.
data.description: Concerns have been raised by lawmakers regarding the balance and effectiveness of the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) in the US, as it currently only has one Senate-confirmed commissioner. This situation has highlighted the need for additional appointments to the CFTC, as having just one confirmed commissioner could hinder the agency's ability to effectively carry out its regulatory duties.

data.title: Tether's CEO plans to continue growing their gold reserves, totaling $24B, stored in a Swiss nuclear bunker.
data.description: Tether, a stablecoin issuer, has become one of the largest holders of gold globally. The company stores the valuable metal in a former Swiss nuclear bunker.

data.title: Disposable Flow-Battery Bioreactor market set to reach $1.36 billion by 2025, up from $1.19 billion in 2024 - 14.1% CAGR.
data.description: The market for disposable flow-battery bioreactors is witnessing substantial growth, with projections indicating an increase from $1.19 billion in 2024 to $1.36 billion in 2025, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 14.1%. This growth can be attributed to various factors such as the growing demand for biopharmaceutical production, a transition towards single-use technologies, and more efficient bioprocessing methods.
